issue.title: map.naver.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/nbbifrcvywgsks80s44cwo804sc0gcwcu7ttg67gbk.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/li7hxnx6q1skcck4s8kkk0wcwkg044wctxta2icodw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.49 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
List-KR Filters last update: | 2026-06-09T08:01:29Z ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.49&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C3%2C10%2C11%2C227&filters_last_update=2026-06-09T08%3A01%3A29Z&stealth.enabled=0)

issue.title: music.bugs.co.kr

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://music.bugs.co.kr/search](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%2Fsearch) ### Comment > 음악 스트리밍 사이트 벅스 music.bugs.co.kr 에서 검색어를 입력했을시 해당 스크린샷 처럼 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 간간히 발생합니다 예전에 추적 보호에서 ip주소 숨기기를 했을때는 어떤걸 검색해도 스크린샷 같이 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 발생했었거든요 그래서 이 옵션은 해제를 하고 사용하고 있는데.. 검색어를 입력할때마다 이런 현상이 간간히 자주 발생하고 있어서 이번에도 애드 가드 문제가 아닐까 생각중입니다 어떤 옵션 때문인지 이런 현상이 생기는지는 잘 모르겠습니다 간간히 발생하는것이라 다시 검색하면 제대로 뜰때가 많아서 옵션을 하나 하나 껏다 켰다 해서 이 옵션이 문제인지 아닌지 확실하게 알수가 없습니다 5월달부터 해당 문제가 발생한것 같고 그렇게 오래 되지는 않았습니다 추적 보호나 네트워크 관련 문제인듯 한데 도저히 어떤것인지 알수 없어서 답답합니다 어떤것 때문인지 확실하게 말해 드릴수 없어서 정말 죄송합니다 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/kygxnpe5qrk4swswsogckg0okkc4g0gtva0ydf71z4.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5iiykxfnahcscws04kso8808kwsgwwc4d6o6ampe4e.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.7 (5271) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.19045.0` Browser: | whale 4.37.378.12 License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**

**Social Widgets:**

**Annoyances:**

**Language-specific:**

[https://music.bugs.co.kr/track/6472731?wl_ref=list_tr_08_ab](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%2Ftrack%2F6472731%3Fwl_ref%3Dlist_tr_08_ab) ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.7+%285271%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.19045.0&browser=other&browser_detail=whale+4.37.378.12&filters=2.3.4.7.19.20.21.202.224.227&custom_filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.servers=https%3A%2F%2Funfiltered.adguard-dns.com%2Fdns-query&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Assistant%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fassistant%252F4.3%252Fassistant.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Popup%2520Blocker%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fpopup-blocker%252F2.5%252Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=1.15%252C%250AUser%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=false&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=https%253A%252F%252Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%252Ftrack%252F6472731%253Fwl_ref%253Dlist_tr_08_ab&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)
